data.title: Revolut seeks U.S. bank charter amid bid for Fed access
data.description:
Revolut U. S. banking license bid targets direct Fed payments; analysts cite OCC, FDIC and Fed reviews as hurdles, with deposits and credit products at stake.
source: https://coincu.com/news/revolut-seeks-u-s-bank-charter-amid-bid-for-fed-access/

data.title: Core Scientific’s AI pivot gets $500M boost as BTC miners count pennies
data.description:
Core Scientific has secured a $500 million loan facility from Morgan Stanley, with an accordion feature that could extend total commitments to $1 billion, in the most significant institutional endorsement yet of the digital infrastructure company’s transformation from Bitcoin miner to artificial intelligence compute provider. The deal, priced at the Secured Overnight Financing Rate plus […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/core-scientific-ai-boost-miner-count-pennies/

data.title: Amazon Experiences Technical Issues in the U.S.
data.description: Amazon users in the United States have reported technical issues, according to DownDetector. The website, which monitors network conditions, indicated that several users experienced disruptions while accessing Amazon's services. The nature and extent of the issues remain unclear, and Amazon has yet to release an official statement addressing the situation. Users are advised to stay updated through official channels for further information.

data.title: Is Ethereum Waking Up? Binance ETH Turnover Hits 6-Month High as Volatility Returns
data.description:
Analysts say high exchange turnover often reflects traders repositioning portfolios quickly during periods of rising volatility.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/is-ethereum-waking-up-binance-eth-turnover-hits-6-month-high-as-volatility-returns/

data.title: Wyoming Is Putting Public Money Into a Bitcoin Treasury Company
data.description:
Wyoming’s State Treasurer disclosed a purchase of 250,000 shares of Strive Inc. on March 5, 2026, marking the first time a U. S. state has directly invested public funds into a publicly traded company that holds Bitcoin as its primary treasury reserve asset
source: https://www.ethnews.com/wyoming-is-putting-public-money-into-a-bitcoin-treasury-company/

data.title: U.S. Treasury to Announce Measures to Address Rising Energy Prices
data.description: The U.S. Treasury is expected to announce measures as early as Thursday to address the surge in energy prices, according to a senior White House official. According to Jin10, these measures may include utilizing the oil futures market to mitigate the impact of rising costs. The announcement comes amid growing concerns over the economic implications of escalating energy prices, which have been affecting various sectors. The Treasury's actions are anticipated to provide some relief and stability to the market, although specific details of the measures have not yet been disclosed. The move reflects the administration's ongoing efforts to manage economic challenges and support the energy sector.

data.description:
Baltex. io now allows Monero-to-TRON swaps in around 20 minutes, combining privacy, speed, and non-custodial control across multiple blockchain networks.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/baltex-speeds-monero-tron-swaps-to-20-minutes/

data.title: Saudi Aramco Sets April OSP for Arab Light Crude to US at $4.60 Premium
data.description: Saudi Aramco has announced the official selling price (OSP) for Arab Light crude oil destined for the United States in April, setting it at a premium of $4.60 per barrel over Argus Sour Crude Index. According to Jin10, this pricing decision reflects Saudi Arabia's strategic approach to its oil exports amid fluctuating global market conditions. The adjustment in OSP is a key indicator of Saudi Aramco's response to current demand and supply dynamics, aiming to maintain its competitive edge in the U.S. market.

data.title: Uber Expands Subscription Testing for Global Drivers
data.description: Uber is reportedly intensifying its efforts to trial a subscription model for drivers worldwide. Bloomberg posted on X that the rideshare company is exploring ways to enhance its services by offering subscription options to its driver network. This initiative aims to provide drivers with more consistent earnings and benefits, potentially improving their overall experience and satisfaction. The move comes as Uber seeks to innovate and adapt to changing market dynamics, ensuring it remains competitive in the global transportation sector. The company has not yet disclosed specific details about the subscription model or its potential impact on drivers and the broader market.

data.title: Following the US, Russia is Now Introducing Major Regulations for Cryptocurrencies
data.description:
Work continues in Russia to regulate cryptocurrencies. The new regulations may be ready by July 1st. Continue Reading: Following the US, Russia is Now Introducing Major Regulations for Cryptocurrencies
source: https://en.bitcoinsistemi.com/following-the-us-russia-is-now-introducing-major-regulations-for-cryptocurrencies/

data.title: Ethereum Surpasses $2,100 Amid Positive MVRV Ratio
data.description: Ethereum has recently climbed above the $2,100 mark, encountering limited resistance. According to NS3.AI, the current positive Market Value to Realized Value (MVRV) ratio indicates that a significant number of holders are now in profit. On-chain data reveals that long-term holders are steadily increasing their Ethereum balances. Analysts suggest that Ethereum's price could either break above the resistance level near $2,165 or retreat towards the support level around $1,902, contingent on market momentum.

data.title: Spain's Defense Minister: Air Defense System Successfully Intercepts Iranian Missile
data.description: Spain's Defense Minister announced that the country's air defense system provided sufficient information to intercept an Iranian missile. According to Jin10, the interception highlights the effectiveness of Spain's defense capabilities in responding to potential threats. The incident underscores the importance of maintaining robust defense systems in the face of global security challenges.

data.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4 Amid QuitGPT Boycott
data.description: OpenAI has started the deployment of its latest model, GPT-5.4, which is touted as its most advanced version yet. According to NS3.AI, this release coincides with a QuitGPT boycott, where approximately 2.5 million users are reportedly canceling subscriptions or promoting the boycott on social media platforms. The GPT-5.4 model enhances reasoning, coding, and agentic capabilities, introduces a 1 million token context window, and achieves significantly higher benchmark scores compared to its predecessor, GPT-5.2, in areas such as computer use, web research, and spreadsheet modeling.

data.title: U.S. and International Concerns Over Eastern Congo Violations
data.description: The United States, along with other international parties, has expressed serious concern over the ongoing and recent violations occurring in the eastern region of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. According to Jin10, these parties are urging all involved stakeholders to immediately and unequivocally recommit to halting hostilities and to return to negotiations.

data.title: Indian Air Force Su-30MKI Fighter Jet Crashes During Training Mission
data.description: An Indian Air Force Su-30MKI fighter jet crashed in the Karbi Anglong region of Assam during a training mission, approximately 60 kilometers from Jorhat. According to Jin10, search and rescue operations are currently underway to locate the aircraft and its crew. The incident highlights ongoing challenges in military aviation safety and the importance of rigorous training protocols. Further details about the cause of the crash and the status of the crew are yet to be released.

data.title: Bank of Canada Completes Project Samara, Issuing Tokenized Bond
data.description:
The Bank of Canada has successfully concluded Project Samara, a pilot initiative that involved the issuance of a three-month, 100 million Canadian dollar tokenized government bond on a blockchain platform. According to NS3.AI, Export Development Canada was responsible for issuing the bond, which was settled using wholesale central bank deposits and managed entirely on the Samara platform, built on Hyperledger Fabric.

The pilot demonstrated potential benefits in terms of operational efficiency and risk reduction. However, it also highlighted challenges such as increased system complexity, liquidity costs, and regulatory gaps. The Bank of Canada anticipates that the broader adoption of such blockchain-based infrastructure will progress slowly due to these challenges.

data.title: Investors Assess Portfolio Risks Amid Market Dynamics
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that investors are increasingly viewing risks across their entire portfolios. This perspective is leading to a more integrated approach between public and private investments. The shift reflects a broader trend in the financial markets where investors are seeking to balance risk and return by considering the interconnectedness of various asset classes. This approach is becoming more prevalent as market dynamics continue to evolve, prompting investors to adapt their strategies accordingly.
